We investigate agent-horizon scaling from two perspectives: scaling long-horizon trajectories and scaling heterogeneous agent abilities. To support this goal, we build a long-horizon knowledge-action infrastructure that connects external knowledge, actions,
articles.summary: 提出Agents-A1，一种35B参数的MoE智能体模型，通过扩展智能体行动视野（horizon scaling）而非参数规模，达到万亿参数级别性能。研究从长视野轨迹和异构能力两个维度进行扩展，并构建了长视野知识-行动基础设施。

articles.excerpt: We present DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview, a preview foundational world model for real-time interactive world simulation. The system adapts the LongLive 1 autoregressive video stack, itself derived from Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, with a residual action pathway inspired by the Matrix-Game family. DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview focuses on a complementary axis to frontier-scale world simulators: low-compute adapta
articles.summary: 发布DreamForge-World 0.1 Preview，一个低计算成本的实时可控世界模型。它基于Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B衍生的LongLive 1自回归视频栈，并融合了Matrix-Game启发的残差动作通路，实现低资源条件下的交互式世界模拟。

articles.title: TACO: Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization for Agentic Tool Use
articles.excerpt: Agentic multimodal models perform diverse operations on an image via code and reason over the returned view, an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual question answering. However, code operations can be useful, redundant, or misleading. Outcome-only rewards cannot precisely distinguish these cases, and existing process rewards either fail to attribute final correctness to individual tool calls
articles.summary: 提出TACO（Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization），用于多模态智能体工具调用的细粒度信用分配。针对代码操作（有用/冗余/误导）难以通过结果奖励区分的问题，TACO对单个工具调用进行过程信用归因，提升视觉问答的可靠性和效率。

articles.title: StrucTab: A Structured Optimization Framework for Table Parsing
articles.excerpt: Table parsing aims to convert table images into structured, machine-readable representations, a task requiring the joint perception of complex spatial layouts and textual content. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable end-to-end parsing, they typically rely on direct supervision of the final output, thereby bypassing the explicit intermediate reasoning that is crucial for understanding
articles.summary: 提出StrucTab，一种结构化优化框架用于表格解析。针对现有VLM端到端方法缺乏中间推理的问题，StrucTab显式建模空间布局与文本内容的联合感知，提升表格结构识别准确性。

articles.title: MR-IQA: A Unified Margin View of Regression and Ranking for Blind Image Quality Assessment
articles.excerpt: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) is commonly built on two basic learning paradigms: regression and ranking. Regression calibrates absolute scores, whereas ranking recovers quality structure from ordinal relations. Although joint regression-ranking supervision often improves BIQA, the relation between the two paradigms remains largely empirical and underexplored. In this work, we revisit what
articles.summary: 提出MR-IQA，统一回归与排序的边际视角用于无参考图像质量评估。重新审视两种范式的关系，通过联合边际优化提升BIQA性能，为质量评估提供理论统一框架。

articles.title: GUICrafter: Weakly-Supervised GUI Agent Leveraging Massive Unannotated Screenshots
articles.excerpt: Data, as the fundamental substrate of modern intelligence, has greatly driven the development of current foundation models. Naturally, researchers aim to extend this paradigm to the domain of GUI agents, hoping to build strong GUI agents through a similar paradigm. However, GUI agent data cannot be directly harvested from the internet, making it costly and difficult to collect at scale. As a resul
articles.summary: 提出GUICrafter，一种弱监督GUI智能体，利用海量未标注截图进行训练。通过从互联网可获取的无标注数据中学习，降低GUI智能体数据收集成本，推动其在自动化任务中的应用。

articles.title: Learning Transferable Dynamics Priors from Action to World Modeling
articles.excerpt: We study action-conditioned world modeling as a scalable way to learn transferable dynamics priors for robot learning. By pretraining a model to predict how actions drive visual scene evolution, the resulting world model captures reusable interaction dynamics beyond appearance-level video generation. Concretely, we pretrain a multi-view interactive base diffusion world model, A2World, on large-sca
articles.summary: 提出A2World，一种基于扩散的多视角交互世界模型，通过预训练学习动作驱动的视觉场景演化，捕捉可迁移的交互动力学。该模型超越外观级视频生成，为机器人学习提供可复用的动力学先验。

articles.title: Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction
articles.excerpt: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate whether models can perceive shallow visual cues, while rarely examining whether MLLMs can learn deeper knowledge or procedural skills fr
articles.summary: 通过通用关键帧提取桥接视频问答与视频引导的智能体任务。指出当前VideoQA基准仅评估浅层视觉感知，提出关键帧提取方法使MLLM学习深层知识与程序技能，扩展视频理解的实用价值。

articles.title: PhysEditWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset Toward Physics-Editable World Models
articles.excerpt: Recent game world models can synthesize visually plausible, action-conditioned rollouts. However, their interaction behaviors often remain limited to exploratory or wandering trajectories, and physical dynamics are typically learned as implicit correlations from data rather than as controllable variables. This limitation hinders their applicability to authored game environments, where physical rul
articles.summary: 发布PhysEditWorld，一个大规模数据集，用于物理可编辑世界模型。针对现有游戏世界模型物理动力学不可控的问题，该数据集提供可编辑的物理规则变量，促进交互式游戏环境的物理真实模拟。

articles.title: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?
articles.excerpt: LLM agents are expected to act over multiple turns, using search, browsing interfaces, and terminal tools to complete user goals. Yet not every goal is well specified or achievable in the available environment. In such cases, a reliable agent should recognize that further interaction is unlikely to help and abstain from additional tool calls. We define Agentic Abstention, the problem of deciding w
articles.summary: 定义“智能体放弃”（Agentic Abstention）问题，即LLM智能体在目标不明确或环境不支持时主动停止工具调用。该工作探索智能体何时应停止而非行动，对构建可靠自主系统具有重要安全意义。
